name: apple-reminders
description: Read, write, and manage macOS Reminders via Apple's native EventKit framework — 10–200× faster than AppleScript alternatives.
long_description: Apple Reminders for Claude provides full CRUD access to your macOS Reminders through Claude Desktop. It wraps Apple's native EventKit framework in a signed, notarized Swift binary, returning stable UUIDs and structured JSON. Thirteen tools cover the full reminder lifecycle: list reminder lists, list reminders (open/completed/all), full-text search, today/overdue/scheduled smart queries, and create/update/complete/uncomplete/delete by ID. All data stays on-device — no network calls. Requires macOS 11+ and grants Reminders access via macOS's standard TCC privacy prompt on first use. Works identically in any language; the tool descriptions match on intent, not keywords. This extension is not affiliated with or endorsed by Apple Inc.

tools.name: get_lists
tools.description: List all reminder lists with open and completed counts.

tools.name: get_list_info
tools.description: Get metadata for one reminder list by exact name.

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.description: List reminders in a specific list, filtered by open/completed/all.

tools.name: search_reminders
tools.description: Full-text search across all reminder lists (title and notes).

tools.name: get_today
tools.description: Get open reminders due today across all lists.

tools.name: get_overdue
tools.description: Get overdue open reminders across all lists.

tools.name: get_scheduled
tools.description: Get all open reminders with a due date.

tools.name: get_reminder
tools.description: Fetch a single reminder by its stable EventKit UUID.

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Create a new reminder in a specified list.

tools.name: update_reminder
tools.description: Update an existing reminder by ID.

tools.name: uncomplete_reminder
tools.description: Unmark a completed reminder (set back to open).

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.description: Permanently delete a reminder by ID.
